en.title: For Starlink Mini USB C to DC Power Cable 16.4 FT/5 M Starlink Mini Cable 100W USB Type-C Input to DC Barrel Jack Charging Cord Waterproof Work with 100W+ PD Source 18AWG
en.description_html:
• 【XLinkShop】 To avoid losses during use and achieve optimal performance, please choose a power bank with at least 100 watts of output power.(20V 5A output). Please Note: The power bank must support PD (Power Delivery) protocol.

  • 【XLinkShop】 Our power cord adopts the same multi-layer winding structure technology as the original factory, and has been upgraded to 18AWG wires, optimizing electromagnetic interference at specific frequencies and improving electromagnetic shielding effect by nearly 30%, greatly reducing the impact of electromagnetic interference on Starlink's signal fluctuations.

  • 【XLinkShop】 USB-C male and barrel jack (DC) male with SL proprietary waterproof gasket, ensuring reliable performance both indoors and outdoors. High quality PVC waterproof casing to withstand any adverse weather conditions encountered during use.

  • 【XLinkShop】 No complex installation steps. Simply plug it into the USB-C port for power supply, eliminating the need for additional power adapters and making it particularly suitable for non-technical users.

  • 【XLinkShop】 Designed for on-the-go use, this starlink mini dc power cable's compact size makes it easy to carry wherever you need power.There are multiple lengths for you to choose from，whether you want to use it at home or outdoors, it can meet your needs.
